House Cleaning & Maid Services in Atlanta

Premium house cleaning for Buckhead, Alpharetta, Sandy Springs, and the greater Atlanta area. From deep cleaning to regular maintenance, we handle everything.

Regular Cleaning

Weekly or bi-weekly maintenance. Same trusted team every visit, flexible scheduling.

Starting at
$90
  • All rooms dusted & vacuumed
  • Kitchens & bathrooms sanitized
  • Floors mopped & polished
  • Trash emptied
Select Plan
Most Popular

Deep Cleaning

Top-to-bottom thorough cleaning. Perfect for first visits, special occasions.

Starting at
$280
  • Everything in regular cleaning
  • Inside cabinets & appliances
  • Baseboards & light fixtures
  • Behind & under furniture
Select Plan

Move In/Out

Get your full deposit back. Landlord-approved cleaning that exceeds expectations.

Starting at
$290
  • Complete property reset
  • Oven & refrigerator deep clean
  • Inside all drawers & closets
  • Wall spot cleaning

Meet Your Cleaning Team

At Santos Cleaning, every team member is treated like family – and we treat your home the same way. That's the difference when you choose a family-owned business.

Same Team Every Visit

You'll see the same trusted faces every time. They know your home and your preferences perfectly.

Fully Licensed & Insured

Complete peace of mind with our comprehensive $1M liability coverage.

Eco-Friendly Products

Safe for kids, pets, and the planet. We avoid harsh chemicals without compromising on cleanliness.

24-Hour Guarantee

Not 100% satisfied? Let us know within 24 hours and we'll come back and fix it for free.

4.9 Average Rating

Based on 27+ reviews on Google

"William and Karen came by on short noticed to do our move in deep cleaning and we appreciate them so much for making sure we move into a clean, sanitized throughly dust free home. I will be setting up a once of month schedule with them from now on"

Corban Glover

in the last week

"Santos Cleaning was amazing in a pinch. My father passed away last Monday and I had reached out to another cleaning company which fell through twice to clean my Mom's house. I reached out to Santos Friday morning and they had Karen come out the same afternoon. She did a fantastic job. Karen was thorough and meticulous and extremely nice. They were very understanding of my situation and incredibly professional. I would hire them again and again, especially if they could come to McDonough. 🙂 Thank you so much from the bottom of my heart. You shed a big light on a dark situation and I cant thank you and your team enough."

Lauren Webb

a week ago

"I was trying to book a move out clean within a weeks notice. SCS was quick to respond with a reasonable rate. All around great communication and excellent service. Will definitely book again if needed."

M B

a month ago

Frequently Asked Questions

Quick answers to common questions about our cleaning services.

We often have same-day availability! Call us before noon at (866) 350-9407 to check today's schedule. For regular appointments, we can usually schedule within 2-3 business days.
